items.title: Tyler Herro to Detroit in Giannis Trade? Timberwolves Guard Options, and More | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: We catch up on today’s recent reports largely surrounding Tyler Herro, Detroit’s quest for more shooting, the Wolves desire for a starting point guard, and fake Trey Murphy and Ja Morant trades. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter: https://twitter.com/YossiGozlan BlueSky:…
